hypothesis: On the Gongora et al. lattice-structure dataset, a CPD-S tensor completion model augmented with a monotonicity constraint on the relative-density mode (increasing density implies nondecreasing E and E/m) will outperform Gaussian Process regression under uniformly random training sets comprising ≤15% of the search space by at least 0.05 absolute R^2 on the held-out test set.
